misc_summary: This file contains legitimate miscellaneous content including: front and back cover advertisements for various Salt Lake City businesses (drug stores, knitting works, undertakers, etc.), an advertisers' directory listing 18 businesses that supported the publication, administrative bulletins about publication distribution to stake and ward presidents, and fragments of the benefit insurance correspondence that appears to have been already extracted as a separate article. All content is either advertising, administrative, or publication-related rather than standalone editorial content.
